title: SSO enforcement bypass via self-service /me/settings endpoint
description: The MeController.updateCurrentUserSettings handler for the self-service PATCH /me/settings endpoint binds the request body to the admin-scoped SettingsUpdateRequestDto and passes the entire payload to userService.updateSettings for the caller's own user id. Because that DTO includes the admin-only allowSSOManualLogin flag, an authenticated user who signed in via SSO could set allowSSOManualLogin on their own account, then create a local password and log in directly with email/password, completely bypassing the organization's SSO policy and any IdP-enforced MFA.
